# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account for logs and backups"
      },
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the storage account"
      }
    },
    "logsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "application-logs",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the container for application logs"
      }
    },
    "backupsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "backups",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the container for backups"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "allowSharedKeyAccess": true,
        "defaultToOAuthAuthentication": false,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "allowCrossTenantReplication": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        },
        "encryption": {
          "requireInfrastructureEncryption": true,
          "services": {
            "blob": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            },
            "file": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            }
          },
          "keySource": "Microsoft.Storage"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "deleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 7
        },
        "containerDeleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 7
        },
        "changeFeed": {
          "enabled": false
        },
        "isVersioningEnabled": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', parameters('logsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "application-logs"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', parameters('backupsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "backups"
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    },
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
    },
    "primaryEndpoints": {
      "type": "object",
      "value": "[reference(variables('storageAccountId')).primaryEndpoints]"
    },
    "logsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('logsContainerName')]"
    },
    "backupsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('backupsContainerName')]"
    }
  }
}
